signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, ABOVE BOK TARGET | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months (January and February), though below market forecasts of 2.4%[2].
